rulings.Case Title: SARAH LEWIS VS. KENNETH RUNYON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 26, 2024 line 1. DEFENDANT NUNUNG SUGIYANTI Amended DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR per August 13, 2024 minute order. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: 819 ELLIS CF HOLDINGS, LLC VS. PHILIP ACHILLES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Motion To Set Aside Judgment Entered June 7, 2024 (Ex Parte) In The Instant Matter; Notice Of Motion; Memorandum In Support Of Defendants' Motion; Declarations
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 26, 2024 line 4. DEFENDANT PHILIP ACHILLES, A.A. PARKING, INC. Defendants' Motion To Set Aside Judgment Entered June 7, 2024 (Ex Parte) In The Instant Matter; Notice Of Motion; Memorandum In Support Of Defendants' Motion; Declarations is DENIED. The motion is purportedly made "under CCP 473(a)." The applicability of this code section to the issue before the Court is unclear that the Court will assume that Defendant meant to move under CCP 473(b) because the motion mentioned "mistake," "surprise" and "negligence." Moving party fails to meet its burden and show that the judgment was entered on June 7, 2024 due to surprise, mistake or excusable neglect. Motion is not supported by admissible evidence and no proposed opposition to the ex-parte application was provided with the moving papers. Additionally, the motion at most attempts to explain failure to appear on June 6, 2024. The hearing resulting in the order occurred on June 7, 2024, i.e. at a hearing distinct from any proposed hearing set for June 6, 2024. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ESTHER SURA BERGER ET AL VS. MARY FRANCES YATES FIETCHER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 26, 2024 line 7. DEFENDANT MARY YATES-FIECHTER DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to reconcile allegations in paragraphs 1, 4, 6(b)(1) and the Lease. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. The Notice provides information regarding entitlement to daily fees and necessary moving fees. What the amount of those necessary moving fees could be and whether Plaintiff would pay those fees (as opposed to daily fees) as an issue of fact not appropriate for determination on a demurrer. =(501/SF) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
